visual_description: A medium shot captures a dimly lit, tense scene in what appears to be an office or interrogation room. The audio is dominated by a tense and suspenseful electronic music track. A deep, pulsing bassline and a steady, rhythmic beat create a feeling of anticipation and unease. In the foreground, a man with short, graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket over a collared shirt, stares forward with a serious and concerned expression. To his left, another man in a patterned shirt is partially visible. The background is dark and indistinct, with a greenish-blue color palette casting a somber mood over the scene. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera remains steady, focusing on the man in the suit. Layered over this are synthesized melodies that build in intensity, enhancing the dramatic and serious atmosphere of the scene. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the group. The man in the suit is still the central focus, his expression unchanged. Behind him, three other men are now visible in the background, standing and observing.
